error.signature: ValueError: Unrecognized configuration class or invalid config parameter for model type
error.regex: (Unrecognized configuration|invalid config|not a valid model type|config.*validation|PretrainedConfig.*error|model_type.*not found)

verdict.summary: Model configuration is invalid or incompatible. Custom model type not registered, config.json corrupt, or version mismatch.

dead_ends.action: Manually edit config.json to fix unrecognized fields
dead_ends.why_fails: Editing config.json without understanding the model architecture can cause silent model corruption or wrong outputs.

dead_ends.action: Downgrade transformers to an older version
dead_ends.why_fails: Older versions may lack support for newer model architectures. Pin to the version the model was released for.

workarounds.action: Upgrade transformers to latest version for new model support
workarounds.how: pip install --upgrade transformers  # new model types require recent library versions

workarounds.action: Use trust_remote_code=True for custom model architectures
workarounds.how: model = AutoModel.from_pretrained('model', trust_remote_code=True)  # enables custom modeling code

workarounds.action: Verify config.json matches the expected model_type
workarounds.how: Check model card for required transformers version; compare config.json with a known-good config
